# Sync with Lena Park — Veritas Seed Round Update

[Amara Okafor](people/amara-okafor) and [Lena Park](people/lena-park) caught up over a 30-minute call to align on the current state of the [Veritas](companies/veritas) seed round and next steps heading into Q1.

Lena opened by confirming that the round had officially closed at **$4.2M**, which she noted came in slightly above the original $4M target. Amara flagged that [Halfway Capital](companies/halfway-capital) would need the final cap table sent over before end of week to reconcile with internal records. Lena said she'd get that to Amara by Thursday.

The two briefly discussed the composition of the round. Amara confirmed that Halfway Capital is coming in at **8% on a post-money basis**, which she said was consistent with what was agreed in the term sheet back in November. Lena didn't push back on the figure but mentioned she'd double-check with [Marcus Reid](people/marcus-reid) on the legal docs since there was apparently some last-minute renegotiation on dilution treatment around the SAFE conversions.

Amara asked whether [Priya Patel](people/priya-patel) was still planning to join the advisory board — Lena said yes, that was still the plan but nothing was signed yet. Amara noted she'd heard the same from Priya directly last week.

On timing, Lena said the wire from the lead investor ([Leo Vance](people/leo-vance)'s fund) had already cleared, and Halfway's wire was expected to settle by January 15th.

**Action items:**
- **Lena** to send final cap table to Amara by Thursday, January 15th
- **Amara** to confirm wire settlement with [Halfway Capital](companies/halfway-capital) finance team
- **Lena** to follow up with [Marcus Reid](people/marcus-reid) on SAFE conversion dilution treatment and loop Amara in if anything changed
- **Amara** to check in with [Priya Patel](people/priya-patel) on advisory agreement status

Overall tone was relaxed — both felt good about where the deal landed. Amara mentioned she'd likely want a intro to the [Veritas](companies/veritas) founding team sometime in February once things settled.
